Class HistoryquoteCoverageResponseMsg.InstrumentCoverageDTO

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.gtnet.model.msg.HistoryquoteCoverageResponseMsg.InstrumentCoverageDTO
Enclosing class:
HistoryquoteCoverageResponseMsg
public static class HistoryquoteCoverageResponseMsg.InstrumentCoverageDTO extends Object
Coverage metadata for a single instrument.

      public long getCoverageDays()
